[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 1101010 4
3 0100001 2
4 1111111 a
5 0001111 4
6 1111010 5
7 1110100 4

70 1110110 5
